onboarding.title: 开始
onboarding.subtitle: 设定你期望的人生长度。
onboarding.editSubtitle: 更改你的出生日期、出生时间或希望寿命。
onboarding.note: 仅保存在本设备。倒计时遵循所选时区。
onboarding.languageQuestion: 选择你的时钟使用的语言。
onboarding.birthDateQuestion: 你的故事从哪一天开始？
onboarding.birthTimeQuestion: 如果知道，请输入你出生的时间。

quotes: This day will not come again. Make it count.
You are living the fraction of time that will never repeat.
Memento mori — remember you must die, so you may truly live.
Not someday. Not when ready. Today is the whole field.
The hour does not wait for your permission to pass.
What you postpone, time steals without apology.
A life is measured in days that look ordinary until they are gone.
Wake before the day wakes you.
Small hours, honestly lived, outweigh loud years forgotten.
You do not lack time. You lack presence.
The clock is not your enemy. Drift is.
Spend today as if you had chosen it on purpose.
Every sunset is a closing chapter. Read it while it is open.
To know the end is near is to see the beginning clearly.
Courage is showing up for one more hour of your life.
Let the fear of wasting time outrun the fear of failing.
Your future self is watching what you do with this afternoon.
Silence the noise. The day is already speaking.
Gratitude is the art of not trading today for regret.
One breath, one choice, one day — that is the whole practice.
Do not hunt immortality in screens. Live what is in front of you.
The grave is patient. Be less patient with distraction.
Love, work, rest — distribute the day as if it were finite. It is.
What would you do if this were your last ordinary Tuesday?
Time is the one currency you cannot earn back. Spend with intention.
Let your mortality sharpen your kindness, not your hurry.
The best preparation for tomorrow is a today fully inhabited.
You are not behind. You are here. Begin from here.
Evening will come. What will it find you building?
Hold the day lightly, but do not drop it.
Remember death; remember therefore to live.
Heaven's clock counts down so you may count what matters up.

premium.title: 天堂时钟 高级版
premium.subtitle: 解锁全部主题、Impact 模式、小组件、遗愿清单，以及电脑版网页时钟。
premium.feature1: 全部时钟主题与 Impact 模式
premium.feature4: 网页时钟 + 安装到电脑
premium.yearlyDesc: 每年续订，订阅期内可使用全部功能。
premium.lifetimeDesc: 一次购买，永久享有全部高级功能。
premium.previewNote: 在浏览器中仅供本设备测试使用。
premium.storeNote: 付款由 Google Play 处理。请使用同一 Google 账号登录各设备。
premium.purchaseFailed: 无法完成购买，请稍后再试。
premium.billingUnavailable: 当前无法使用结算功能。
premium.restoreFailed: 无法恢复购买，请稍后再试。
premium.purchaseYearlyDone: 年付高级版已在此设备激活。
premium.purchaseLifetimeDone: 终身高级版已在此设备激活。
premium.restoreEmpty: 此 Google 账号尚未找到高级版购买记录。

bucket.title: 愿望清单
bucket.placeholder: 趁还能做时想完成的一件事
bucket.empty: 写下一件你不想再拖延的事。

page.intro: 不要一次就想写出 100 条。先回答一个问题，借一个好例子，慢慢收集你不想一再推迟的人生。
page.inputPlaceholder: 例如：和父母完成一直推迟的那次旅行
page.emptyPage: 还没有愿望。点一个问题或示例，从一条开始。
page.bucketLimit: 免费版最多 3 条愿望。要打开高级版添加更多吗？

prompts.beforeLate: 趁还来得及，你最想做什么？
prompts.gratitude: 趁还能说出口，你想感谢谁？
prompts.place: 死前一定要去的地方是哪里？
prompts.learn: 如果钱不是问题，你想学什么？
prompts.apology: 有没有一直推迟的道歉或和解？
prompts.body: 你想为身体做的一件事是什么？
prompts.memory: 你想和所爱的人留下怎样的画面？

suggestions.family_phone_free: 和父母度过一整天，不看手机
suggestions.family_photo: 拍一张像样的全家福并装裱起来
suggestions.family_letter: 给感激的人写一封手写信
suggestions.travel_city_week: 在总说“以后要去”的那座城市住上一周
suggestions.travel_dawn_train: 独自坐一趟黎明列车，去看陌生的海
suggestions.travel_meaningful_place: 回到对我有意义的那个地方
suggestions.learning_instrument: 开始学一件惦记多年的乐器
suggestions.learning_language_letter: 学到能用外语写一封短信
suggestions.learning_books: 重读 10 本改变过我人生的书
suggestions.courage_apology: 把拖延已久的道歉当面说出来
suggestions.courage_public_start: 把因害怕而没开始的事，哪怕很小，也公开迈出一步
suggestions.courage_release_regret: 用一句话说出困住我已久的遗憾，然后放下
suggestions.health_walk_100: 用身体会感谢我的方式走上 100 天
suggestions.health_sleep_month: 过一个月不牺牲睡眠的日子
suggestions.creation_finish_work: 以自己的名字完成一件小作品
suggestions.creation_record_year: 用照片、文字或视频记录这一年的生活
suggestions.creation_teach: 把我懂的东西教给某个人
suggestions.spirit_no_proving: 过一天不向任何人证明什么
suggestions.spirit_values: 写下对我真正重要的五个价值
suggestions.spirit_end_today: 在安静的地方想象生命的尽头，再选择今天
